sheet.label: FRONTEND INTEGRATION
sheet.title: 8. Frontend Integration & User Experience
sheet.p: The Theta Chat Bot will be integrated into the existing Theta Technolabs website without requiring any major modifications to the current frontend architecture. Since the website is developed using a no-code platform (such as Webflow), the chatbot will be embedded using a lightweight JavaScript widget that communicates with the FastAPI backend through secure REST APIs.
This approach minimizes development effort while ensuring that the chatbot provides a seamless and consistent user experience across all website pages.
Handling loading, error, and fallback states
The frontend contains no AI logic. All retrieval, prompt construction, and response generation are handled by the backend.
The chatbot frontend consists of three primary components:
A floating action button displayed on every page of the website.
Responsible for communication with the backend.
Every user interaction follows the same communication flow.
This lightweight communication model keeps the frontend simple while allowing the backend to manage all business logic.
The following sequence describes a typical user interaction.
Visitor opens the Theta Technolabs website.
The chatbot launcher appears at the bottom-right corner of the screen.
The visitor clicks the chatbot icon.
The chatbot displays a welcome message.
"Hello! 👋 I'm the Theta AI Assistant. How can I help you today?"
The frontend sends the request to the backend.
The chatbot displays a typing indicator while the backend processes the request.
If available, the chatbot displays a reference to the related website page.
The user can continue the conversation or close the chatbot.
To provide a smooth user experience, the chatbot supports multiple interface states.
Information not found in the knowledge base
Question is outside the chatbot's supported domain
Each state provides clear visual feedback to improve usability.
To encourage user engagement, the chatbot can display suggested questions when first opened.
What services does Theta Technolabs provide?
Which technologies do you specialize in?
How can I contact your team?
Do you provide mobile app development services?
These suggestions help users understand the chatbot's capabilities and reduce uncertainty.
Every chatbot response should follow a consistent format.
Theta Technolabs provides Artificial Intelligence Development, Machine Learning, Computer Vision, and Conversational AI solutions.
This structure improves transparency and encourages users to explore the website further.
If the chatbot cannot confidently answer a question, it should provide a helpful fallback experience instead of generating uncertain information.
"I couldn't find enough verified information to answer your question accurately. You may find more details on our website or contact our team for further assistance."
"I'm designed to answer questions related to Theta Technolabs, including our services, technologies, portfolio, careers, and company information. I can't assist with unrelated topics."
This approach maintains transparency while guiding users toward the appropriate next step.
The chatbot interface should provide a consistent experience across all supported devices.
The chatbot should follow general accessibility best practices to ensure usability for a wider audience.
Implementing these practices improves the overall user experience and aligns with modern web accessibility standards.
The modular frontend architecture allows future improvements without changing the backend.
Enables seamless integration with the existing website without redevelopment.
Keeps the frontend lightweight and secure by avoiding AI logic in the browser.
Improves conversational continuity while remaining anonymous.
Helps users discover chatbot capabilities quickly.
Prevents misleading responses and improves user trust.
Ensures consistent experience across desktop and mobile devices.
Improves usability for all users and aligns with modern web standards.
